programme.desc: People In the jute mills near Kolkata, where harsh conditions persist, the threatened industry and its environmental toll unfold, raising the question of whether change can emerge from hardship.

programme.title: Threads Of Gold
programme.desc: People In the jute mills near Kolkata, where harsh conditions persist, the threatened industry and its environmental toll unfold, raising the question of whether change can emerge from hardship.

programme.title: Shepherds Around The World
programme.desc: People Mark Michel and his team embark on a global journey, immersing themselves in the lives of five diverse pastoral communities to explore their unique cultures, challenges, and enduring traditions.

programme.title: Four Seasons In The Forests
programme.desc: Nature Different creatures interact with nature; some appear and others hide each season, providing variety in the forest.

programme.title: The Battle For Survival In The Mediterranean
programme.desc: Nature Despite the dangers and threats to which marine creatures are exposed daily in the Mediterranean Sea due to factory and farm waste, these creatures struggle to survive through adaptation and biological evolution.

programme.title: In Love With Wild Horses
programme.desc: People An amazing journey through the enchanting nature of the North American continent, home to the Tsoulcotine people, known as the horse people because of their timeless and unique bond with horses.

programme.title: Arab Digital Community
programme.desc: Sciences Examines the impact of digital content on Arab society by following top content creators and how they shape the audience's awareness, questions, and values.

programme.title: Arabic Radio
programme.desc: History.

programme.title: The Diabetes Battle In Australia
programme.desc: Fitness & Health An Australian physician and a physiologist are revolutionizing the world of diseases by presenting a scientifically based diet that can eliminate type 2 diabetes.

programme.title: Mysteries Of The Modern Science
programme.desc: Sciences Despite the progressive scientific developments in many fields, science remains baffled by unexpected cosmic phenomena such as solar storms. Research into many mysteries continues, but science must be prepared to deal with the discoveries' consequences.

programme.title: Protecting Sondong Cave
programme.desc: Nature A journey into the heart of Phong Nha-Ke Bang cave, located in northern Vietnam and listed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site. This cave, the largest in the world, is an extraordinary marvel, featuring a lake, forest, clouds, and a rare ecosystem.

programme.title: Secrets Of Mount Olympus
programme.desc: Nature An exciting and enjoyable exploratory adventure in one of the strangest places in the world: Mount Olympus, once the home of the gods in Greek mythology. Now, scientists are working tirelessly to understand its strange phenomena.

programme.title: Santorini's Mystery
programme.desc: Nature Researchers from around the globe embark on a high-stakes mission to investigate the volatile volcano of Santorini, plunging beneath the sea to gather evidence and unravel questions that have intrigued historians and scientists for decades.

programme.title: Cheese From The Heart Of Nature
programme.desc: Nature Cheese makers strive to preserve the traditional flavor threatened by modern industry, passing down their age-old secrets through generations, believing that authentic taste is crafted by patient, loving hands, not machines.

programme.title: A Mosque's Story
programme.desc: History We travel through the mosques of the world to learn their untold stories, contemplate their designs and decorations, and explore through them the cultural and social transformations that they have witnessed over time.

programme.title: Crescent In The Face Of Nazism
programme.desc: History During the Nazi invasion of France, hundreds of Jews found refuge in the Grand Mosque of Paris and other Islamic institutions, where Muslims bravely risked their lives to shield them from capture and death.

programme.title: Arab Digital Community
programme.desc: Sciences Examines the impact of digital content on Arab society by following top content creators and how they shape the audience's awareness, questions, and values.

programme.title: The Impossible Journey
programme.desc: Nature In the heart of the icy wilderness, 28 brave adventurers battle for survival after being stranded. Tim Jarvis revives their impossible journey in a legendary challenge.

programme.desc: Nature Scientists embark on a journey to the coldest and most frozen places, where they uncover mummified bodies, lost treasures, and mysterious viruses beneath layers of ice, using state-of-the-art tools and technologies that give us glimpses into the past.

programme.desc: Nature A journey into the heart of Phong Nha-Ke Bang cave, located in northern Vietnam and listed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site. This cave, the largest in the world, is an extraordinary marvel, featuring a lake, forest, clouds, and a rare ecosystem.

programme.title: Secrets Of Mount Olympus
programme.desc: Nature An exciting and enjoyable exploratory adventure in one of the strangest places in the world: Mount Olympus, once the home of the gods in Greek mythology. Now, scientists are working tirelessly to understand its strange phenomena.

programme.title: Santorini's Mystery
programme.desc: Nature Researchers from around the globe embark on a high-stakes mission to investigate the volatile volcano of Santorini, plunging beneath the sea to gather evidence and unravel questions that have intrigued historians and scientists for decades.

programme.title: Cheese From The Heart Of Nature
programme.desc: Nature Cheese makers strive to preserve the traditional flavor threatened by modern industry, passing down their age-old secrets through generations, believing that authentic taste is crafted by patient, loving hands, not machines.

programme.title: A Mosque's Story
programme.desc: History We travel through the mosques of the world to learn their untold stories, contemplate their designs and decorations, and explore through them the cultural and social transformations that they have witnessed over time.

programme.title: Crescent In The Face Of Nazism
programme.desc: History During the Nazi invasion of France, hundreds of Jews found refuge in the Grand Mosque of Paris and other Islamic institutions, where Muslims bravely risked their lives to shield them from capture and death.

programme.title: Arab Digital Community
programme.desc: Sciences Examines the impact of digital content on Arab society by following top content creators and how they shape the audience's awareness, questions, and values.

programme.title: The Impossible Journey
programme.desc: Nature In the heart of the icy wilderness, 28 brave adventurers battle for survival after being stranded. Tim Jarvis revives their impossible journey in a legendary challenge.

programme.title: The Impossible Journey
programme.desc: Nature In the heart of the icy wilderness, 28 brave adventurers battle for survival after being stranded. Tim Jarvis revives their impossible journey in a legendary challenge.

programme.title: Tahtaci People.. Children Of Forest
programme.desc: Nature In the Aegean forests in southern Turkey, a strange sect of loggers performs special rituals when cutting trees in season, where they pray and offer sacrifices because they believe that each tree has its own spirit.

programme.title: Secrets Deep In The Ice
programme.desc: Nature Scientists embark on a journey to the coldest and most frozen places, where they uncover mummified bodies, lost treasures, and mysterious viruses beneath layers of ice, using state-of-the-art tools and technologies that give us glimpses into the past.

programme.title: Crescent In The Face Of Nazism
programme.desc: History During the Nazi invasion of France, hundreds of Jews found refuge in the Grand Mosque of Paris and other Islamic institutions, where Muslims bravely risked their lives to shield them from capture and death.

programme.title: Envy
programme.desc: Deprived of her mother's love and overshadowed by her privileged brother, Seniha, trapped in her own home, seethes with resentment until long-suppressed jealousy drives her toward a breaking point that could shatter their wealthy family's facade. Ozgu Namal, Selahattin Pasali.

programme.title: The Fall Of The King
programme.desc: Kenan Baran, a wealthy and narcissist businessman, leads a secretive double life filled with emotional turmoil. However, when the challenges he encounters reach critical turning points, he is compelled to reassess his mindset and reshape his life. Halit Ergenç, Merve Dizdar, Aslihan Gurbuz, Nilperi Sahinkaya, Nalan Kuruçim, Durul Taylan, Yagmur Taylan, Eylem Akin.

programme.desc: While a surprise marriage disrupts the Albora family's fragile balance, Cihan and Alya's relationship grows stronger. With conspiracies mounting, unexpected news arrives that will change the course of events. Ozan Akbaba, Sinem Unsal.

programme.title: Underground
programme.desc: Imprisoned for vengeance and entangled in Turkeys' deadliest cartel, Haydar Ali's true war ignites upon his release, when he learns that the woman he has always loved got married to his closest ally. Devrim Ozkan, Deniz Can Aktas.

programme.title: The Traitor

Although the relationship between her and her mother is marred by tensions, she seeks to build a new life and repair her relationship with those around her. Ozge Ozpirincci, Demet Akbag.

programme.title: Challenges At Midlife
programme.desc: Returning home to save his father's factory, Jian is reunited with his former love Ning. Amid family disputes and legal struggles, old feelings resurface and they face problems of their age. Yi Xing Zhang, Lei Jiayin.

programme.title: The Distant City
programme.desc: While a surprise marriage disrupts the Albora family's fragile balance, Cihan and Alya's relationship grows stronger. With conspiracies mounting, unexpected news arrives that will change the course of events. Ozan Akbaba, Sinem Unsal.

programme.title: Underground
programme.desc: Imprisoned for vengeance and entangled in Turkeys' deadliest cartel, Haydar Ali's true war ignites upon his release, when he learns that the woman he has always loved got married to his closest ally. Devrim Ozkan, Deniz Can Aktas.

programme.title: Envy

Halit Özgür Sari, Yurdaer Okur, Dolunay Soysert, Bertan Asllani, Cagatay Tosun, Hilal Yildiz, Halit Ozgur Sari, Simay Barlas.

programme.title: Bahar
programme.desc: After surviving a serious illness, Bahar, a devoted wife, finds herself facing a series of personal setbacks. With her marriage falling apart, she chooses to reclaim control of her life by returning to the medical career she once left behind. Demet Evgar, Mehmet Yilmaz Ak, Bugra Gülsoy, Ecem Özkaya, Füsun Demirel, Bugra Gulsoy, Ecem Ozkaya, Fusun Demirel, Elit Andac Cam, Demirhan Demircioglu, Neslihan Yesilyurt, Ayca Uzum.

programme.desc: S2 E1 تحقق الشرطة في قضية مقتل نهى وتتوصل إلى أن الجريمة ارتكبت بدافع السرقة، فيما يطلب حسين من مريم أن تعمل لديه في الشركة، بينما تحذر هناء خادمتها بشأن تقربها من ابنها أشرف.
programme.title: ولاد تسعة موس

programme.desc: S1 E7 تحاول شيماء أن تمضي وقتا ممتعا، ولكن تثير رسائل تهديد نصية قلقها. في هذه الأثناء، يصعب على أمال نفي شكوكها حيال علي.
programme.title: أعلى نسبة مشاهدة موس

programme.desc: S2026 E41 قراءة مختلفة وتحليل عميق للأخبار والقضايا والأحداث السياسية في الشارع المصري.
programme.title: يحدث في مصر

programme.desc: S2 E7 يستمر كمال في مراقبة مريم وماجد، فيما يرقد نعمان في حالة حرجة داخل العناية المركزة. أما راضية فتعطي كمال مبلغا من المال ليبدأ به مشروعه الجديد.
programme.title: عائلة الحاج نعمان موس

programme.desc: S1 E7 تتحدث والدة خالد مع زوجته وتحاول إقناعها بأمر ما، فيما يحاول زوج مها تبرير عودته لتعاطي الممنوعات.

programme.desc: S2 E8 يطرد نعمان محروس وأولاده، فيما يخبر سمير قاسم عن رغبته في الحصول على حصته من أموال محروس الأمر الذي يرفضه قاسم بشدة.
programme.title: عائلة الحاج نعمان الموس

programme.desc: S1 E5 تبلغ الأمور حدها بين أمال وعلي بعد شجار كبير بينهما. تتلقى العائلة خبرا مفجعا. يحث فوكس ونسمة شيماء على القيام بمزيد من الإعلانات.
programme.title: أعلى نسبة مشاهدة الموس

programme.desc: S1 E6 تدفع شيماء دين حمدية بدون علمها. لاحقا، تتلقى دعوة من كاميليا لحضور افتتاح مطعم. عندما يقع هاتف علي بين يدي أمال، تقرأ محادثة تزعجها.
programme.title: أعلى نسبة مشاهدة الموس

programme.desc: S1 E7 تحاول شيماء أن تمضي وقتا ممتعا، ولكن تثير رسائل تهديد نصية قلقها. في هذه الأثناء، يصعب على أمال نفي شكوكها حيال علي.
programme.title: أعلى نسبة مشاهدة موس

programme.desc: S1 E8 بعد أن تكذب شيماء بشأن مصدر أموالها، تواجهها أمال بشكوكها. تشعر شيماء بالسعادة الغامرة عندما يعبر حسن لها عن رغبته في تطوير علاقتهما.
programme.title: أعلى نسبة مشاهدة الموس

programme.desc: S2026 E117 برنامج صباحي يتم تقديمه في إطار جذاب يهتم بكل ألوان الحياة في مصر حيث يعرض آخر الأخبار ويسلط الضوء على السلبيات الموجودة في المجتمع المصري للمساعدة في حلها.
programme.title: صباحك مصري

programme.desc: S1 E34 يتبين أن منى وراء ابتزاز كل من نهى وحسين وتهديدهما بفضحهما بالفيديو، بينما تسوء الحالة الصحية لابنة إحسان التي لا تستطيع بدورها تدبير مبلغ العملية.
programme.title: ولاد تسعة موس

programme.desc: S1 E35 حكايات أربع خادمات تكشف أسرار وخفايا عالم الخادمات في المنازل، وكل ما يعانين منه في مجتمع يرمقهن دوماً بنظرة مختلفة.
programme.title: ولاد تسعة موس

programme.desc: S1 E36 الأخيرة.
programme.title: ولاد تسعة موس

programme.desc: S2 E1 تحقق الشرطة في قضية مقتل نهى وتتوصل إلى أن الجريمة ارتكبت بدافع السرقة، فيما يطلب حسين من مريم أن تعمل لديه في الشركة، بينما تحذر هناء خادمتها بشأن تقربها من ابنها أشرف.
programme.title: ولاد تسعة موس

programme.desc: S2 E2 تحقق الشرطة مع عمرو ويارا وحسين بشأن قضية مقتل نهى، بينما تصدر النيابة أمرا بالقبض على إحسان، فيما تقوم رحاب بإخبار الطبيب حاتم بشأن استئجار رحم خادمتهم كريمة.
programme.title: ولاد تسعة موس

programme.desc: S1 E5 تسوء حالة خالد النفسية بعد وفاة والده لكن الحاج فياض صديق والده يشد من أزره ويطلب منه العودة إلى عمله، ولاحقاً يتفاجأ خالد بطلب أمه وشقيقاته توزيع ميراث والده.
programme.title: ولي العهد الموس

programme.desc: S1 E6 بعد قيام خالد بتنفيذ وصية والده، تنقلب جميع شقيقاته ضده، فيما ينجح عزيز في طبع المفتاح الخاص بخزانة خالد، غير أن وقوع حدث صاعق يخلط الأوراق مجدداً.
programme.title: ولي العهد الموس

programme.desc: S1 E7 تتحدث والدة خالد مع زوجته وتحاول إقناعها بأمر ما، فيما يحاول زوج مها تبرير عودته لتعاطي الممنوعات.
programme.title: ولي العهد الموس

programme.desc: S1 E8 تشتد حدة الصراع بين الأخوة بسبب الميراث، فيما يحاول عزيز إيهام ابنة عمه مي بحبه لها.
programme.title: ولي العهد الموس

programme.title: The Fate Of Our Horoscope
programme.desc: Preeta and Shrishti's father confesses on his deathbed that their mother, Sarla, has two other daughters and they all live in Mumbai. The two sisters set out on a journey to Mumbai to find their family and connect with them. Dheeraj Dhoopar, Shraddha Arya.

programme.title: The Fate Of Our Horoscope
programme.desc: Preeta and Shrishti's father confesses on his deathbed that their mother, Sarla, has two other daughters and they all live in Mumbai. The two sisters set out on a journey to Mumbai to find their family and connect with them. Dheeraj Dhoopar, Shraddha Arya.

programme.title: Window Girl
programme.desc: Raised under strict control by her mother, Nalan gets married to Sedat, who comes from a very wealthy family. Soon, she discovers that his family is also unstable, forcing her to deal with problems from both sides. Burcu Biricik, Selma Ergec.

programme.title: Window Girl
programme.desc: Raised under strict control by her mother, Nalan gets married to Sedat, who comes from a very wealthy family. Soon, she discovers that his family is also unstable, forcing her to deal with problems from both sides. Burcu Biricik, Selma Ergec.

programme.title: Kaise Mujhe Tum Mil Gaye
programme.desc: Amruta believes in love and marriage, while Virat avoids relationships because of past heartbreak. As they spend time together, they must deal with their differences and the growing challenges in their relationship. Sriti Jha, Arjit Taneja.

programme.title: Kaise Mujhe Tum Mil Gaye
programme.desc: Amruta believes in love and marriage, while Virat avoids relationships because of past heartbreak. As they spend time together, they must deal with their differences and the growing challenges in their relationship. Sriti Jha, Arjit Taneja.

programme.title: Marasli
programme.desc: Celal's life takes a dangerous turn when he crosses paths with Mahur, a courageous journalist who witnesses a crime. Since then, their fates become intertwined. Burak Deniz, Alina Boz, Serhat Mustafa Kiliç, Saygin Soysal, Cengiz Sezgin, Arda Sarigün, Ethem Özisik.

programme.title: Marasli
programme.desc: Celal's life takes a dangerous turn when he crosses paths with Mahur, a courageous journalist who witnesses a crime. Since then, their fates become intertwined. Burak Deniz, Alina Boz, Serhat Mustafa Kiliç, Saygin Soysal, Cengiz Sezgin, Arda Sarigün, Ethem Özisik.

programme.title: Tongue-tied
programme.desc: When Nelly, a vigilant teacher with a troubled past, suspects that a looming danger hovers over her beloved step-son, she stops at nothing to protect him, leading to a domino effect that threatens the stability of her family and community. Amina Khalil, Ahmad Al Saadany, Mohamed Shahin, Yosra Al Lozy, Tharaa Goubil, Karim El Shennawy, Mariam Naoum.

programme.title: Kaleerein
programme.desc: Meera is a free-spirited woman who rejects the pressure of traditional marriage. Her life changes when she meets Vivaan, a wealthy businessman searching for his family in India. Arjit Taneja, Aditi Sharma.

programme.desc: Addinath M Kothare wanders through the Konkan coast to visit small villages and meet local people while discovering the ancient history and the simple daily customs that define this seaside region. Addinath M Kothare.

programme.title: Singham Again
programme.desc: DCP Bajirao Singham faces a drug gang led by a vengeful terrorist and races against time to save his wife and prevent an imminent attack with the help of his fellow officers. programme.title: Tongue-tied
